subject: Bottle club Q2 shipment — wrong label on Cask Strength bottle
description: Received Q2 shipment and one of the Cask Strength Bourbon bottles has the wrong batch label — says Batch 5 but should be Batch 6.

subject: Private tour inquiry — corporate group of 14
description: Interested in booking a private tour for an Epic Systems team offsite. 14 people, sometime in mid-June. Do you have availability?

subject: Osteria Grazia — rye shipment short 6 bottles
description: Invoice says 24 bottles rye but received 18. Can you check the packing slip and arrange to send the remaining 6?

subject: Gift set purchase — cannot find online checkout link
description: Tried to order the two-bottle gift set from your website but the checkout page shows 'temporarily unavailable'. Is there another way to order?

subject: Distilling class — accessibility question for wheelchair user
description: Planning to attend the June 18 distilling class. One member of our group uses a wheelchair. Is the tasting room accessible?

subject: Bottle club renewal — update payment method
description: Annual renewal coming up. Need to update the card on file.

subject: Star Liquor — reorder request for Driftless Gin
description: We are down to 3 bottles of Driftless Gin. Can you add 2 cases to this month's wholesale order?

subject: Tasting room hours — is the holiday event on Dec 19 ticketed?
description: Saw on Instagram that there is a holiday event December 19. Is it ticketed? How do we get tickets?

subject: Pig in a Fur Coat — requesting sample of new gin botanicals for fall menu
description: Interested in using the Driftless Gin in a fall cocktail. Can you send a 200ml sample and the botanicals spec sheet?

subject: Question about Wisconsin spirits shipping — can you ship to Minnesota?
description: We are in Minneapolis. Can you ship bottles directly to us, or do we need to pick up at the tasting room?

subject: Damaged bottle received — bourbon neck cracked in shipment
description: Ordered a bottle of Heartland Bourbon online. It arrived with a cracked neck, sealed but damaged. Requesting replacement.

subject: Distilling class — request for receipt for employer reimbursement
description: Attended the April class. My employer's expense system requires an itemized receipt. Can you email one to me?

subject: Rye whiskey — request for allergy/gluten info
description: A member of my family has celiac disease. Is the Heartland Rye gluten-free after distillation?

subject: Tasting room — group reservation for 20 people
description: We have a party of 20 for a Saturday afternoon. Do you accommodate groups that size? What is the process for reserving?

subject: Osteria Grazia — request for quarterly allocation pricing
description: We'd like to discuss a quarterly allocation commitment for Heartland Bourbon and Rye. Can Jacob or someone call me this week?

subject: Bottle club — when does Q3 shipment drop?
description: Loved the Q2 shipment. Any hints about Q3? When can we expect it?

subject: Bourbon — looking for list of Wisconsin stores that carry Heartland
description: I live in Green Bay. Where can I buy Heartland Bourbon near me?

subject: Star Liquor — invoice discrepancy on last month
description: Invoice HS-2026-WHL-0318 shows $1,512 but we were quoted $1,428. Can you check the pricing?

subject: Wedding private event quote — 60 guests, October
description: Getting married October 11. Interested in a private buyout of the tasting room for a cocktail hour for approximately 60 guests. Please provide a quote.

subject: Cask Strength Bourbon — availability and how to purchase
description: I saw on Instagram that you have a cask strength bourbon. How many bottles are left and how do I buy one?

subject: Distilling class gift — how to buy as a gift for someone else
description: Want to buy a class ticket as a birthday gift for my husband. Can I buy it in my name and have him attend?

subject: Metcalfe's Market - past-due balance, second notice (collections)
description: Metcalfe's Market balance of $1,360 (INV-2026-0504) is now 60+ days past due - unpaid since December 2025. Second notice sent, no response. Account placed on credit hold. Do not confirm anniversary case allocation for this account until the outstanding balance is cleared.
